title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su presents a hierarchical workspace system for Claude designed to function as an AI second brain. The system uses instruction files, persistent memory, and a three-level hierarchy to organize workstations and projects for practical use cases like email management, expense tracking, and content drafting.
